statement: The RSI strategy (length 20, long on cross above 70, short on cross below 30, 200 EMA filter, ATR multiplier-2 stop loss) produced a 49.8% win rate and a net loss of 36% on the 30-minute timeframe across 10 assets from December 2022 to December 2024 (~2,700+ trades).
verdict_reason: the video makes this point but it isn't a checkable claim

statement: The RSI strategy produced a ~53% win rate and 172% net profit on the 1-hour timeframe across the same 10-asset portfolio over 24 months (~1,500 trades).
verdict_reason: the video makes this point but it isn't a checkable claim

statement: The same RSI strategy on the 30-minute timeframe produced a net profit of 61% and a 54% win rate specifically on the S&P 500 over the same 24-month test window.
verdict_reason: the video makes this point but it isn't a checkable claim
